trigger: 冲入厢房目睹女儿被推倒早产，以及在正堂强硬拒绝沈词求和时

appearance_delta.face: 目眦欲裂，满脸惊恐与极度的愤怒，额头青筋暴起，彻底失去平日的温和
appearance_delta.body: 肌肉紧绷，呈绝对的保护性姿态挡在女儿身前，爆发出惊人的力量感
appearance_delta.hair: 因惊慌奔跑和情绪激动导致网巾略微歪斜，发丝凌乱
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 触及底线后展现出文人的铮铮铁骨，眼神充满对沈词的敌意与防备

costume_override.outfit: 略显凌乱的深灰色居家常服，衣摆可能因奔跑而带有褶皱

visual_reference: A 50-year-old ancient Chinese father, slightly chubby, wearing a slightly messy dark grey casual ancient robe. Half-white hair slightly disheveled. Face showing extreme shock, explosive anger, and fierce protectiveness, glaring furiously at an unseen enemy. Dramatic high-contrast lighting, intense cinematic atmosphere, highly detailed, photorealistic.
